Operation 'hubDelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Description is missing entirely. Added details about what the operation does (removes subscription), its effects (stops event notifications), and input requirements (hub ID parameter). This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it for unsubscribing from events.

data.current_summary: Remove a subscription (hub) to receive Events
data.description_suggestion: Removes an existing event subscription (hub) identified by the provided ID. Terminates the communication endpoint registration and stops event notifications from being sent to that endpoint. Requires the hub ID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Description is missing entirely. Added details about what the operation does (removes subscription), its effects (stops event notifications), and input requirements (hub ID parameter). This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it for unsubscribing from events.

message: Operation 'productAttributeValueChangeEvent' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are vague and don't clearly indicate this is a notification receiver endpoint. Improved summary to be action-oriented. Enhanced description to clarify this is a listener endpoint for receiving product attribute change events, explain when it's triggered, and how it relates to the hub subscription mechanism. This helps AI agents understand the operation's role in the event notification workflow.

data.current_description: Example of a client listener for receiving the notification ProductAttributeValueChangeEvent
data.summary_suggestion: Receive product attribute value change notification
data.description_suggestion: Receives and processes ProductAttributeValueChangeEvent notifications when a product's attribute values are modified in the inventory. This is a listener endpoint that should be registered as a hub subscription to receive these events. The operation accepts the event payload and processes the product attribute change notification.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are vague and don't clearly indicate this is a notification receiver endpoint. Improved summary to be action-oriented. Enhanced description to clarify this is a listener endpoint for receiving product attribute change events, explain when it's triggered, and how it relates to the hub subscription mechanism. This helps AI agents understand the operation's role in the event notification workflow.

message: Operation 'listProduct' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Missing details about filtering capabilities, pagination, and return format. AI agents need clarity on when to use this operation versus retrieveProduct, and what filtering options are available. Enhanced version explains the operation's purpose, input parameters (filters), output (collection), and use cases.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a collection of products with filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of Product entities from inventory based on optional filter criteria. Supports filtering by product attributes and pagination. Returns a list of Product objects matching the specified criteria. Use this operation to search for products in inventory or retrieve all products when no filters are applied.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Missing details about filtering capabilities, pagination, and return format. AI agents need clarity on when to use this operation versus retrieveProduct, and what filtering options are available. Enhanced version explains the operation's purpose, input parameters (filters), output (collection), and use cases.

message: Operation 'createProduct' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks critical details about inputs (what fields are required/optional), outputs (what is returned, including the assigned ID), and side effects (inventory state change, event notifications). Enhanced description provides AI agents with necessary context about creation rules, default values, and event triggering for proper operation sequencing.

data.current_description: This operation creates a Product entity.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Product entity in the inventory. Accepts a Product object with required and optional attributes. Returns the created Product with assigned identifier and default values applied. The operation adds the product to inventory and triggers product lifecycle events. Supports creation rules and administration-level configurations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks critical details about inputs (what fields are required/optional), outputs (what is returned, including the assigned ID), and side effects (inventory state change, event notifications). Enhanced description provides AI agents with necessary context about creation rules, default values, and event triggering for proper operation sequencing.

message: Operation 'retrieveProduct' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description mentions attribute selection but lacks clarity on what this means for AI agents and doesn't explain what the operation returns. Enhanced version clarifies the attribute selection feature, specifies that it applies to first-level attributes, explains the return value structure, and provides context for when to use this operation versus listProduct.

data.current_description: This operation retrieves a Product entity. Attribute selection enabled for all first level attributes.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific Product entity from inventory by its unique identifier. Supports attribute selection to customize the response and retrieve only first-level attributes as needed. Returns the complete Product object with all associated details including services, resources, and characteristics. Use this operation to fetch detailed information about a specific product in inventory.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description mentions attribute selection but lacks clarity on what this means for AI agents and doesn't explain what the operation returns. Enhanced version clarifies the attribute selection feature, specifies that it applies to first-level attributes, explains the return value structure, and provides context for when to use this operation versus listProduct.

message: Operation 'deleteProduct' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is minimal and lacks important details about side effects (inventory removal, event notifications), return value (HTTP 204), and operational constraints (administration-level, state restrictions). Enhanced version provides AI agents with critical information about what happens when the operation executes, what response to expect, and important preconditions to consider.

data.current_description: This operation deletes a Product entity.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a Product entity from inventory by its unique identifier. This operation removes the product from inventory and triggers product lifecycle deletion events. Returns HTTP 204 No Content on successful deletion. Note: This is an administration-level operation and may have restrictions based on product state or dependencies. Verify product can be safely removed before deletion.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is minimal and lacks important details about side effects (inventory removal, event notifications), return value (HTTP 204), and operational constraints (administration-level, state restrictions). Enhanced version provides AI agents with critical information about what happens when the operation executes, what response to expect, and important preconditions to consider.

message: Operation 'patchProduct' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but could be more precise. Description is too vague and lacks essential details about partial update semantics, what gets returned, and side effects. Enhanced version clarifies that only provided fields are modified (key distinction from full replacement), explains the return value, mentions event triggering, and notes support for rules and administration configurations. This helps AI agents understand when to use PATCH versus PUT and how to construct requests.

data.current_description: This operation updates partially a Product entity.
data.description_suggestion: Performs a partial update of a Product entity in inventory by its unique identifier. Accepts a Product object with only the attributes to be modified; unspecified attributes remain unchanged. Returns the updated Product object with all current values. Supports updating product rules and administration-level configurations. Triggers product lifecycle update events. Only provided fields are modified, enabling selective updates without affecting other product properties.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but could be more precise. Description is too vague and lacks essential details about partial update semantics, what gets returned, and side effects. Enhanced version clarifies that only provided fields are modified (key distinction from full replacement), explains the return value, mentions event triggering, and notes support for rules and administration configurations. This helps AI agents understand when to use PATCH versus PUT and how to construct requests.
